+ "Skipped intro or voice training"
+ "The \"App Access\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls which apps can use Siri and Apple Intelligence, including per-app learning, suggestions, and shortcut access."
+ "The \"App Clips\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls whether Siri can suggest and learn from App Clips."
+ "The \"Extensions\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It allows users to enable and configure third-party AI models and extensions that Siri can use."
+ "The \"Keep Conversations\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls how long Siri conversation history is retained before being deleted."
+ "The \"Language\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It allows users to change the language Siri listens and responds in."
+ "The \"Opens To\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls whether the Siri app opens to recent conversations or starts a new conversation."
+ "The \"Requests\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls how Siri is activated, including whether \"Hey Siri\" and \"Just Siri\" voice trigger phrases are enabled."
+ "The \"Responses\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls whether Siri speaks responses aloud, shows captions, and always displays recognized speech."
+ "The \"Restrict Access\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls which apps Siri and Apple Intelligence can access, including per-app learning, and shortcut access."
+ "The \"Siri & Dictation History\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It allows users to review and delete their Siri interaction history and voice input data."
+ "The \"Visual Intelligence\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It controls visual recognition and image analysis features, including searching the web using the camera."
+ "The \"Voice\" setting is in the iOS Settings app under the \"Siri\" pane. It allows users to pick from different Siri voice options including accent and style variations."
